sentences.text: A budget isn't a one-time document — it's a living plan.
At the end of each month, bring your actual numbers back to AI and ask: "Here's what I budgeted and here's what I spent.
What worked, what didn't, and what should change next month?"
This turns budgeting from a guilt exercise into a feedback loop.
Maybe the limit was unrealistic — or maybe one specific week drove it all.
AI spots those distinctions instantly, without judgment.
